skill.name: prompt-engineer
skill.description: Transforms rough prompts into optimized, production-ready prompts using 11 established frameworks including RTF, Chain of Thought, RISEN, RODES, and more
skill.summary: AI-powered prompt optimization using 11 proven frameworks to transform vague requests into precise, effective prompts
skill.author: Eric Andrade

security_audit.summary: All 148 static analysis findings are false positives. The detected patterns exist in documentation files (README.md, SKILL.md) showing example usage in markdown code blocks, not executable code. Shell command examples are instructional text for users, path references are markdown relative links, and 'cryptographic' detections are framework names like 'Chain of Thought'. No actual security risks identified.

content.user_title: Optimize Your AI Prompts with Proven Frameworks
content.value_statement: Stop struggling with vague AI responses. This skill transforms your rough ideas into precise, framework-optimized prompts that deliver consistent, high-quality results from any AI assistant.
actual_capabilities: Analyzes user intent and detects task complexity automatically
Applies 11 proven prompting frameworks (RTF, Chain of Thought, RISEN, RODES, Chain of Density, RACE, RISE, STAR, SOAP, CLEAR, GROW)
Blends multiple frameworks intelligently for complex tasks
Asks targeted clarifying questions only when critical information is missing
Generates copy-ready prompts in clean markdown format
Adapts prompt language to match user input language
limitations: Requires user to provide some initial context or rough idea to optimize
Framework selection happens silently without explanation unless explicitly requested
Maximum of 3 clarifying questions to avoid user fatigue
Uses standard framework definitions without customization options

use_cases.title: Developers Seeking Better Code Generation
use_cases.description: Transform vague coding requests into precise technical prompts that specify requirements, constraints, and expected output format for more accurate AI-generated code

use_cases.title: Content Creators Improving AI Writing
use_cases.description: Convert basic writing ideas into structured prompts that include audience, tone, format, and content guidelines for consistent, high-quality AI-generated content

use_cases.title: Analysts Enhancing Data Insights
use_cases.description: Turn general analysis requests into methodical prompts using frameworks like RISE or Chain of Thought for systematic, thorough AI-powered analysis
use_cases.target_user: Data analysts and business intelligence professionals

prompt_templates.title: Quick Prompt Enhancement
prompt_templates.prompt: Improve this prompt: [paste your rough prompt here]
prompt_templates.scenario: Use when you have a basic prompt that needs refinement for better AI responses

prompt_templates.title: Complex Task Structuring
prompt_templates.prompt: Create a detailed prompt for: [describe your complex goal with multiple requirements]
prompt_templates.scenario: Use for multi-phase projects requiring structured approach and clear deliverables

prompt_templates.title: Framework-Specific Request
prompt_templates.prompt: Transform this into a Chain of Thought prompt: [your problem that needs step-by-step reasoning]
prompt_templates.scenario: Use when you want the AI to show its reasoning process for debugging or complex logic

prompt_templates.title: Role-Based Prompt Generation
prompt_templates.prompt: Create a prompt where the AI acts as a [specific expert role] to help me [specific task]
prompt_templates.scenario: Use when you need specialized expertise or perspective for your task

output_examples.input: improve this prompt: help me write Python code
output: The skill asks for clarification: What type of Python code do you need?

After selecting 'Web scraping', outputs a structured prompt with Role (Python developer expert), Task (create web scraping script), Requirements (BeautifulSoup, rate limiting, error handling), and Output format (complete commented code)

output_examples.input: create prompt for: product recommendation system with purchase history and market trends
output: Generates a comprehensive RODES + Chain of Thought prompt with Role (ML engineer), Objective (design recommendation system), Details (data sources, algorithms, metrics), Step-by-step approach, Examples (pseudocode, diagrams), Sense Check validation, and Output format (technical design document)

best_practices: Provide specific context about your goal rather than generic requests for better results
Select 'Web scraping' from the multiple-choice options when the skill asks for clarification to get a more targeted prompt
Use the refined prompt directly with your AI assistant without modification for consistent results
anti_patterns: Do not expect the skill to explain which framework it used unless you explicitly ask
Avoid providing overly vague input like 'help me improve' without specifying what to improve
Do not mix multiple unrelated tasks in a single prompt optimization request

faq.question: Do I need to learn prompting frameworks to use this skill?
faq.answer: No. The skill automatically selects and applies the best framework(s) based on your task. You simply describe what you want, and it handles the framework selection silently.

faq.question: How many questions will the skill ask me?
faq.answer: Maximum 2-3 questions, and only when critical information is missing. Most prompts are optimized directly without any clarification needed.

faq.question: Can I use the generated prompts with any AI model?
faq.answer: Yes. The prompts are model-agnostic and work with Claude, ChatGPT, Gemini, or any conversational AI assistant.

faq.question: What if I want a shorter or longer prompt?
faq.answer: You can request adjustments like 'make it shorter' or 'add more detail' after receiving the optimized prompt, and the skill will refine it accordingly.

faq.question: Does this skill work in any project context?
faq.answer: Yes. It is a universal skill that works in any terminal context without requiring specific project structure, Obsidian vaults, or external configuration.

faq.question: What languages are supported?
faq.answer: The skill adapts to your input language. If you provide input in Portuguese, it generates the prompt in Portuguese. Mixed inputs default to English.
